items.detail: 787 trigger zones (threshold: 90). Zones used in triggers are evaluated every frame.
CTLD detected in mission scripts. checkHoverStatus and checkAIStatus poll every 1–2s over all registered transport pilots — a steady CPU cost at scale.

8,861 non-blank lines of mission-specific Lua (frameworks excluded): MA_Setup_CA.lua (4,775), WelcomeMessage.lua (1,914), Foothold Config.lua (1,044), EWRS.lua (1,009), Zeus.lua (87), gm_bench.lua (32). Threshold: warning >5,000, critical >15,000.
